name: Study Room video search returns educational results
description: User searches for an educational video in the Study Room, sees search results, and can select one to load the video player.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Click the Study Room link in the sidebar
Type a search term like 'linear algebra' in the video search input field
Submit the search or press Enter
Verify that search results appear showing video titles related to the search term, with at least one clickable result item
